headline: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
summary: AI virtual staging creates misleadingly perfect apartment listings. Renters are frustrated by finding actual homes that don't match enhanced photos. The technology makes apartment hunting a difficult and often disappointing experience.

headline: The Apple Watch SE 3 is just $199 for Prime Day
summary: The Apple Watch SE 3 hits an all-time low price of $199 for Prime Day. This 'sleeper hit' model received significant upgrades last year. New features include an always-on display and useful wrist gestures.

headline: The Steam Machine is the start of an even more expensive future for game consoles
summary: Video game consoles and PC components are facing rising prices. The Steam Machine exemplifies this trend towards more expensive hardware. A global RAM shortage is largely to blame for increasing costs across gaming.

headline: Google invests in A24 to build AI movie tools
summary: Google's DeepMind AI lab is partnering with A24 to develop new film production technologies. The collaboration aims to expand storytelling possibilities for filmmakers using AI. Google is investing around $75 million into A24 for this R&D initiative.

headline: The Apple Watch Series 11 Drops to Its Lowest Price Ever for Amazon Prime Day
summary: The Apple Watch Series 11 is now at its lowest price ever for Prime Day. This model is considered the best for most iPhone users. Grab this top-tier smartwatch deal before it's gone.

headline: The Jackery Explorer 240D 80,000mAh Power Bank Drops to a New Price Low, Just $102 at AliExpress
summary: The Jackery Explorer 240D power bank is now available at a new price low. Get the high-capacity 80,000mAh power station for just $102. This deal offers excellent value for portable power needs.

headline: Walmart Just Slashed 50% Off the PlayStation PULSE Explore Planar Magnetic Wireless Gaming Earbuds
summary: Walmart is offering 50% off the PlayStation PULSE Explore earbuds. These planar magnetic wireless earbuds are ideal for PS5 gaming. Secure the best PS5 earbuds for under $100 with this deal.

headline: The New 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 Chip Drops to Its Lowest Price Ever for Amazon Prime Day
summary: The 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 chip reaches its lowest Prime Day price. Shoppers can save $80 compared to buying directly from the Apple Store. This is a prime opportunity for a significant discount on the latest iPad Air.

headline: Analysis: Everything points to Burnham becoming PM within weeks
summary: Analysis suggests Andy Burnham could become Prime Minister in a matter of weeks. He may not have to wait until September if no leadership contest emerges. This forecast follows recent significant political developments.

headline: Watch: A day of big changes and mixed emotions for Labour
summary: Andy Burnham was sworn in as MP for Makerfield today. This occurred just hours after Keir Starmer announced his resignation as Labour Party leader. The day brought significant shifts and mixed feelings within the Labour party.

headline: Why did Starmer resign and what could happen next?
summary: Keir Starmer has resigned from his position as Labour leader. He confirmed he will remain Prime Minister until his successor is chosen. The resignation sparks questions about Labour's future leadership and direction.

headline: Starmer's premiership in six charts
summary: BBC Verify reviews Sir Keir Starmer's time in government. His premiership is analyzed across six key performance areas. The report covers his record since taking office in July 2024.
